title: lobelia psilostoma
intro: Lobelia psilostoma, also known as the frog-lobelia, is a perennial plant species in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant compounds. The plant has been valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Lobelia psilostoma is often prepared as a tincture or tea for its medicinal use, although it should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
